famous quote:
You either get bitter or you get better. It's that simple. You either take what has been dealt to you and allow it to make you a better person. Or you allow it to tear you down. The choice does not belong to fate. It belongs to you.
-Josh Shipp
Interview Text:
Debra:

(part 1)

Debra is a friend from church who has visions. She has the gift of intercession and prays for hours. Many times the Lord speaks to her through visions so that she will know what to pray for a certain person. She also sees her body as a prophetic instrument similar to the prophets in the Bible whose bodies were used by God to illustrate truth to the Israelites. 

"Ross you could add in examples here from Isaiah and Jeremiah and Ezekiel. Ezekiel 37 The hand of the Lord was upon me... is a good example. 

Sometimes when she is praying, she will feel the Holy Spirit influence a certain part of her body to do something. For example, if He wants to use her hand, she feels a force flow down her arm and into her hand, compelling her hand to do a certain action.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine this as the type of longing we have for God, and the torture of not being fully satisfied to know him on this side of heaven.
